1_raw_directory.description: 第二篇文档被复制到 raw/ 目录
1_raw_directory.evidence: No raw/ directory exists in the outputs. The only directory under outputs/ is sources/, which contains only transformer-overview.md. The efficient-transformers.md source document was not preserved anywhere in the outputs.

2_new_atoms.description: 创建了关于 Linformer、Reformer、Performer、Flash Attention 的新 atom
2_new_atoms.evidence: All four atoms were created: efficient-transformer-linformer.md, efficient-transformer-reformer.md, efficient-transformer-performer.md, efficient-transformer-flash-attention.md. Each contains substantive content about the respective method.

3_existing_atoms_updated.description: 已有的 atom 被更新（sources 字段包含新源文件）
3_existing_atoms_updated.evidence: Partial updates occurred but sources fields were NOT updated. transformer-limitations.md was updated with a contradiction block referencing efficient-transformers.md in the body. transformer-self-attention.md got a new cross-reference to on2-complexity-debate. However, the frontmatter source field of transformer-limitations.md still reads 'source: transformer-overview.md' only — efficient-transformers.md is not listed. Similarly, all other existing atoms with frontmatter still only list transformer-overview.md as source. The non-frontmatter atoms (e.g., transformer-self-attention.md) also only list transformer-overview.md in their sources section.

4_contradiction_block_exists.description: 对于 O(n^2) 复杂度是否为瓶颈的矛盾，至少有一个 atom 包含 CONTRADICTION 块
4_contradiction_block_exists.evidence: on2-complexity-debate.md is a dedicated contradiction record atom. It contains: 矛盾概述 (contradiction overview), 来源一/来源二 (both sources with their positions), 矛盾分析 (contradiction analysis table), 综合判断 (reconciliation). Additionally, transformer-limitations.md has a '矛盾标记' (contradiction marker) section that references the conflict with efficient-transformers.md.

5_contradiction_has_both_sides_and_resol.description: CONTRADICTION 块包含双方主张和 Resolution 状态
5_contradiction_has_both_sides_and_resol.evidence: on2-complexity-debate.md clearly documents both sides: 来源一 (transformer-overview.md: O(n^2) is a main limitation) and 来源二 (efficient-transformers.md: O(n^2) is not a bottleneck for common sequence lengths 512-4096). The 综合判断 section provides a resolution: the two sources are complementary rather than contradictory — O(n^2) is a theoretical limitation, but in practice the bottleneck depends on sequence length, and IO optimization (Flash Attention) is more effective than complexity reduction for common lengths. A 建议 section provides actionable guidance.

6_comparison_atom.description: 创建了 comparison 类型的 atom（四种高效方法的对比）
6_comparison_atom.evidence: efficient-transformer-comparison.md exists and contains a comparison table of all four methods (Linformer O(n), Reformer O(n log n), Performer O(n), Flash Attention O(n^2)) with columns for complexity, approximation status, main advantages, and main disadvantages. It also includes key observations about the trade-offs between exact and approximate methods.

7_index_and_log.description: index.md 反映所有新增和更新的 atom，log.md 包含本次 atomize 操作的条目
7_index_and_log.evidence: SPLIT RESULT: index/INDEX.md is fully updated (21 atoms, 2 source documents, 1 contradiction marker, complete tag cloud). HOWEVER, the root-level index.md is STALE — it still shows only 9 atoms, only transformer-overview.md as source, and makes no mention of efficient-transformers.md, Linformer, Reformer, Performer, Flash Attention, or the contradiction. The log (index/LOG.md) correctly contains entries for all operations including '操作三：原子化第二来源（efficient-transformers.md）' and '操作四：矛盾检测与标记' with detailed descriptions.

summary: The without-skill execution shows strong content quality but structural inconsistencies. Strengths: excellent contradiction detection and resolution (on2-complexity-debate.md is thorough), proper creation of all four efficient transformer atoms, and a well-structured comparison atom. Weaknesses: (1) No raw/ directory for source document preservation, (2) existing atom source fields were not updated to include efficient-transformers.md, (3) the root-level index.md was not updated while index/INDEX.md was — this inconsistency suggests the output may have been a fresh build rather than an incremental update of an existing wiki at /tmp/atom-wiki-eval-1/. The dual set of atoms (e.g., transformer-self-attention.md vs self-attention-mechanism.md) also suggests a rebuild rather than an in-place update.
